label: critical
text: Grandma, it's Tyler. I got into a car accident and I'm at the hospital. I need $1,500 for surgery right now. Please don't call my old number, it's broken. Don't tell Mom, she'll panic. Send it to this account: 4829103847.
notes: FTC case pattern: grandparent scam with voice + urgency + secrecy + new account

label: critical
text: This is Officer Davis from the IRS Criminal Investigation Division. Your Social Security number has been suspended due to suspicious activity linked to a drug trafficking case. You have an active arrest warrant. To avoid immediate arrest, you must pay $2,400 in Google Play gift cards within the next 2 hours. Do not contact anyone or you will be arrested.

label: critical
text: Hi, I'm currently in an executive board meeting and unable to take calls. I need you to urgently process a wire transfer of $87,500 to a new vendor we just signed. Account: JP Morgan Chase, routing 021000021, acct 7832910456. This is strictly confidential — do not discuss with the finance team until I return. Please confirm when done.
notes: BEC with domain spoofing, secrecy, new account

label: high
text: My darling, I have finally gotten clearance to come home. But the military base is requiring a processing fee of $1,800 before they will release me from deployment. Once I am home I will never leave your side again. Can you help me with this one last thing? I love you more than words.
notes: Military romance scam with deployment story

label: high
text: Wells Fargo ALERT: Your account has been locked due to suspicious activity. Unauthorized access detected from Ukraine. Verify your identity immediately at wellsfargo-secure-login.net to restore access. Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent account suspension.

label: critical
text: Dad it's Chris. I'm at the police station. Someone put drugs in my bag at the airport. My lawyer says I need $3,000 cash bail or I'll be held over the weekend. Please don't tell Mom, she'll freak out. Please come alone and bring cash.

label: high
text: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected as our monthly winner for a free iPhone 15 Pro. To claim your prize visit: apple-rewards-monthly.net/claim before midnight. Only 2 spots remaining. Act now!
notes: Prize phishing with fake Apple branding

label: critical
text: This is Agent Morrison from the Department of Homeland Security. Your name has appeared in a federal investigation related to money laundering. Your bank account will be seized in the next 4 hours unless you cooperate. You must withdraw all funds and convert to Bitcoin immediately to protect your assets during the investigation. Tell no one.
notes: DHS impersonation with crypto conversion demand

label: medium
text: FedEx: Your shipment is on hold. An incomplete customs declaration requires a $8.50 processing fee to release your package. Pay now or your package will be returned: fedex-customs-release.com/pay
notes: Delivery scam with small fee to reduce suspicion

label: high
text: Quick favor needed. I'm in meetings all day and my corporate card isn't working. Can you buy 5 x $100 Amazon gift cards for client thank-you gifts? Scratch the back and email me the redemption codes ASAP. I'll get you reimbursed first thing tomorrow. Keep this between us for now.
notes: Gift card BEC variant — very common

label: critical
text: Mom, this is Emma. I'm in Berlin and things have gone very wrong. I got arrested at the airport and my lawyer says I need $5,000 for bail immediately. I'm texting from a stranger's phone. Please don't tell Dad yet, I don't want him to worry. Wire it to this account number right now.

label: high
text: Your PayPal account has been permanently limited due to unusual activity. To appeal and restore access, you must verify your identity within 48 hours. Provide your full name, date of birth, SSN, and banking information at: paypal-identity-appeal.com. Failure to respond will result in funds being held for 180 days.

label: medium
text: Your Netflix account payment failed. Update your billing information to avoid service interruption: netflix-payment-update.net/billing. Your account will be suspended in 24 hours.

label: critical
text: My love, I have been saving for years and I have $380,000 that I need to transfer out of Nigeria before the government seizes it. I need a trusted US bank account to receive the funds temporarily. I will give you 30% as a thank you. This must be kept completely secret. You are the only person I trust.
notes: Classic advance fee / romance hybrid scam

label: high
text: URGENT: You missed federal jury duty. A warrant has been issued for your arrest. To avoid being taken into custody today, call the court marshal at 1-888-234-5678 within 1 hour and pay the $750 failure-to-appear fine. Do not ignore this notice.

label: high
text: Hi Grandpa, it's Jessica. I had a small accident and the other driver wants cash to settle it outside insurance. I need $900 right now. My phone is broken so please don't try calling me back. Don't tell Grandma, I'm embarrassed. I'll explain everything tonight.

label: medium
text: Chase Bank: Suspicious transaction of $1,243.00 detected on your account ending in 4821. If this was not you, click to dispute immediately: chase-fraud-dispute.com/review
notes: Chase fraud alert phishing with specific amount to add credibility

label: critical
text: This is an urgent and confidential request. Our legal team has advised that we must complete a wire transfer of $234,000 to an escrow account today as part of a merger we cannot yet disclose publicly. Use the following account and do NOT enter it into our accounting system until Monday. Routing: 021000021, Account: 9847302156.
notes: Large BEC with confidential merger pretext

label: high
text: Your Google account has been accessed from a new device in Romania. If this was not you, secure your account immediately: google-account-secure-verify.com. Your account will be deleted in 12 hours if unverified.
notes: Google account phishing with deletion threat

label: medium
text: USPS: We attempted delivery of your package but could not complete it. A $3.50 redelivery fee is required. Schedule redelivery at: usps-package-redeliver.net within 48 hours or package will be returned.

label: high
text: Good morning my love. My phone is running out of credit and I am afraid I will lose contact with you. Can you please send $80 to this number for a top-up? I cannot bear to go a day without hearing from you. You mean everything to me.

label: critical
text: This is a recorded message from the Social Security Administration. Your Social Security number has been suspended due to suspicious activity. Press 1 now to speak with an officer or a warrant will be issued for your arrest within 24 hours. This is your final notification.

label: high
text: Hey Mom it's Danny. I got mugged outside the bar last night. They took my phone and wallet. I'm using a friend's phone. I just need $350 to get home and replace my ID. Can you Zelle me? New number for now is this one. Don't worry, I'm okay.

label: medium
text: As a valued Costco member you have been selected to receive a $250 shopping reward. Verify your membership details at: costco-member-reward.net/verify to claim your reward before it expires in 48 hours.

label: high
text: Capital One Security Alert: Your card ending in 3847 has been temporarily blocked due to a suspicious transaction of $892. To unblock and verify, confirm your details at: capitalone-verify-card.com immediately.

label: critical
text: Grandma it's Kevin. I'm in so much trouble. I need you to please go to the bank right now and withdraw $2,000. I'll send someone trusted to pick it up. Please don't call my parents about this, it's really important. I'll explain everything tomorrow I promise. I love you so much.
notes: Grandparent cash pickup scam — very common FTC pattern

label: high
text: I need you to process a vendor payment urgently. Our usual payment system is down for maintenance. Wire $34,000 to the following account before 3pm today. This has been pre-approved. Do not go through procurement for this one. Details attached.

label: medium
text: DHL Express: Your international shipment requires customs clearance. Pay the $14.99 duty fee within 24 hours to release your package: dhl-customs-fee.com/release

label: high
text: My dearest, I had a road accident yesterday and my medical bills are $1,600. I have no family here and you are all I have. Once I recover I will fly to you immediately. I know this is a lot to ask but I have never needed anyone like I need you right now. Please help me.

label: high
text: Your Instagram account has been flagged for violating community guidelines. Your account will be permanently disabled in 24 hours unless you submit an appeal: instagram-appeals-center.com/submit. Act immediately.

label: safe
text: Hey Mom, can you pick me up from soccer practice at 5:30? Coach says we're finishing early today.
notes: Normal family message — must be safe

label: safe
text: Hi honey, I'm running about 20 minutes late for dinner. Traffic on the 405 is terrible right now. Can you hold the food?

label: safe
text: Dad, can you send me $40 for groceries? I'll pay you back when I see you Sunday. My Venmo is @jake-miller22
notes: Normal small money request from family — must NOT flag

label: safe
text: Good morning team! Don't forget we have the Johnson account review at 2pm today in Conference Room B. Please bring your Q3 reports. See you there.

label: safe
text: Hey, are you free Saturday night? We're throwing a surprise birthday party for Sarah. Let me know if you can come! Should be fun.

label: safe
text: Reminder: Your dentist appointment is scheduled for Tuesday at 10:00 AM. Please call 555-0182 to confirm or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance.
notes: Normal appointment reminder — urgency is legitimate

label: safe
text: Your Amazon order has shipped and is expected to arrive Friday by 8pm. Track your package in the Amazon app.

label: safe
text: Hi, just finished the quarterly report you asked for. I've attached the final version — let me know if you need any changes before Thursday's presentation.
notes: Normal work email — must be safe

label: safe
text: Mom, I love you! Thank you so much for everything you do for our family. Can't wait to see you at Christmas next month.

label: safe
text: Team — Monday standup is moved to 10am this week due to the all-hands. Same Zoom link as usual. See you all then!

label: safe
text: Hey babe, can you pick up some milk and eggs on your way home? Also we're out of coffee. Thanks!

label: safe
text: Your prescription is ready for pickup at CVS Pharmacy. Store hours are 8am-10pm. Questions? Call 555-0199.

label: safe
text: Hi there! Just wanted to follow up on our meeting last week. I've drafted the proposal you requested — attached here. Happy to hop on a call to discuss any changes. Best, Sarah

label: safe
text: Flight AA2847 to Chicago is now boarding at Gate B22. Please have your boarding pass ready. Estimated departure: 3:45pm.

label: safe
text: Your Uber is arriving in 3 minutes. Driver: Michael, Toyota Camry, silver, plate ABC-1234.

label: safe
text: Happy birthday! Hope your day is wonderful. Let's catch up soon — it's been too long. Miss you!

label: safe
text: Mom this is Jake. My phone battery died and I'm borrowing my friend's phone just to let you know I'll be home by midnight. Don't worry!
notes: Borrowed phone — normal context, no money request

label: safe
text: Can you wire me $200? I need to pay rent by tomorrow and my paycheck hasn't cleared yet. I'll pay you back Friday for sure. You can use Zelle.
notes: Edge case: money request with deadline — but from known context, small amount, specific repayment. Should be low/safe.

label: safe
text: Your bank statement for October is now available. Log in to your account at chase.com to view your statement. No action required.
notes: Legitimate bank statement notification — no link manipulation

label: safe
text: Heads up — there's a water main break on Oak Street and traffic is backed up. Take the alternate route via Elm. Should clear up by 6pm.

label: low
text: URGENT: Your car's extended warranty is about to expire. Call us now at 1-800-555-0143 to extend your coverage before it's too late.
notes: Borderline — annoying but low-risk, no link or payment pressure

label: low
text: You have been pre-approved for a personal loan up to $35,000 with low interest rates. Reply to this email to speak with a loan officer today. Limited time offer.
notes: Borderline marketing — pushy but no clear scam pattern

label: medium
text: T-Mobile: Your bill of $127.43 is past due. To avoid service interruption, pay now: tmobile-pay-now.com. If already paid, disregard.
notes: Billing phishing — medium because link is suspicious

label: low
text: Hi, I found your number online. I'm selling a used iPhone 13 in great condition for $350. Interested? Can meet locally.
notes: Marketplace listing — could be legitimate, low risk

label: medium
text: Your LinkedIn account will be restricted due to unusual activity. Verify your account within 24 hours to avoid disruption: linkedin-account-verify.com/secure

label: low
text: This is a reminder that your mortgage payment of $1,847 is due on the 15th. Log in to your account to pay or set up autopay.
notes: Legitimate payment reminder — no suspicious link

label: medium
text: Zelle: A transfer of $500 is pending your verification. Confirm or cancel at: zelle-transfer-verify.net within 1 hour.

label: high
text: Mom I need help. I'm at the hospital. Please don't call right now I can't talk. I need $600 for a procedure insurance won't cover. Please Zelle me at this number. Tell no one yet.
notes: Hospital impersonation — high risk: phone avoidance + secrecy + money + urgency

label: medium
text: Your Medicare account has been flagged for potential fraud. Call 1-888-347-2910 within 24 hours to verify your account or your benefits may be suspended.
notes: Medicare scam — medium due to missing link/payment demand

label: high
text: I have been offered a very lucrative contract in the US and I am finally coming to meet you. But I need to pay a $1,100 visa processing fee first. This is the last obstacle between us. Can you help me just this once? I will pay you back tenfold when I arrive.

label: safe
text: Hey, did you see the game last night? Unbelievable ending. We have to talk about it.

label: safe
text: Please review and sign the attached NDA before our meeting on Thursday. You can sign digitally using DocuSign. Let me know if you have any questions.

label: safe
text: Your DoorDash order from Chipotle is on its way! Estimated delivery: 7:32pm. Track your order in the app.

label: safe
text: Hi, this is Dr. Johnson's office calling. We need to reschedule your appointment on Thursday to Friday at the same time. Please call us back at 555-0147 to confirm.

label: safe
text: Your two-factor authentication code is 847291. This code expires in 10 minutes. If you did not request this, you can ignore this message.
notes: Legitimate 2FA code from own login action

label: high
text: Microsoft Security Alert: Your Windows PC has been infected with 3 critical viruses. Your data is at risk. Call our certified technicians immediately at 1-844-892-3847 or visit: microsoft-support-alert.com
notes: Tech support scam — fake virus alert

label: critical
text: This is Detective Harris from the county sheriff's office. We have a warrant for your arrest for failure to appear in court. However, you can resolve this by paying a $1,500 bond using iTunes gift cards right now. If you hang up, officers will be dispatched to your location immediately.
notes: Gift card demand from fake detective — very common FTC pattern

label: high
text: Hi, one of our overseas partners has issued a revised invoice with new banking details. Please update our records and process the outstanding payment of $52,000 to the new account before end of day. The old account is no longer active. Details in attached invoice.

label: medium
text: Your package from China is being held at customs. To clear it you must pay import tax of $18.50 within 48 hours: customs-import-pay.com/clear

label: critical
text: Grandpa it's me your granddaughter Amy. I'm in serious trouble and I need you to stay calm. I was in a car accident abroad and my passport was seized. My lawyer says I need $4,000 to get released and come home. Please don't tell anyone in the family right now, especially not Dad. Can you go to the bank today?
notes: Overseas family emergency scam — classic FTC grandparent pattern
